schemas.description: Expert business valuation in Bangalore. IBBI registered valuer. DCF, market multiples, NAV methods. SEBI/FEMA/Companies Act compliant. Call +91-95139 39333.

schemas.name: Business Valuation Services Bangalore
schemas.description: Expert business valuation in Bangalore. IBBI registered valuer. DCF, market multiples, NAV methods. SEBI/FEMA/Companies Act compliant. Call +91-95139 39333.

mainEntity.name: What qualifications does your valuer hold?

acceptedAnswer.text: CA V. Viswanathan is an IBBI Registered Valuer (Securities or Financial Assets, Reg. No. IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333), Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA), and Associate Company Secretary (ACS). IBBI registration is mandatory for valuations under Companies Act Section 247 and IBC.

mainEntity.name: How long does a business valuation take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically 7-15 working days depending on complexity, data availability, and purpose. Urgent valuations for regulatory deadlines can be delivered in 3-5 days with premium pricing.

mainEntity.name: What valuation methods do you use?

acceptedAnswer.text: We apply multiple methods — DCF (income approach), comparable company multiples (market approach), and NAV (asset approach) — and triangulate to arrive at fair value. The method weightage depends on the business type, stage, and valuation purpose.
